description_long: This object is a rectangular jersey barrier with a slightly tapered profile, constructed from what appears to be solid concrete. Its surface is painted a rusty orange color and features bold, diagonal black stripes running across its length, giving it a high-visibility, industrial look. The paint appears weathered, with some mottling and subtle surface texture, suggesting exposure to outdoor elements. The barrier is solid and blocky, with flat top and bottom surfaces and slightly angled sides. There are no visible handles, holes, or interactive components, and the ends are flat and unadorned. This type of barrier is commonly used for traffic control, construction zones, or to block vehicle access in urban environments.
description: A solid, orange concrete jersey barrier with bold black diagonal stripes and a weathered, industrial finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the barrier with prominent black diagonal stripes on an orange, weathered surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow, tapered profile and the thickness of the barrier, with minimal visible striping.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same orange color and black diagonal stripes across the length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow, wedge-like profile with faint striping visible along the edge.
